outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Negative aggregate GEX (-5.87B) and spot below 0DTE Gamma Flip signal dealer hedging will amplify volatility.
outlook.summary: Market is in a short-gamma regime (Total GEX -5.87B) with Spot (640.81) pinned just below the 0DTE Gamma Flip (643.91). Dealers are forced to sell into weakness, making 640 the critical battleground. A loss of 640 triggers an acceleration toward 630. Heavy Put OI (PCR > 2.0) confirms bearish pressure, though extreme readings suggest potential for violent mean reversion if 643.91 is reclaimed.

levels.motivazione: Structural pivot for 0DTE. Spot trading below this level confirms negative gamma regime, forcing dealers to sell rallies and exacerbate downward moves.
Massive Resonance across 0DTE (19.6k OI), Weekly (14.8k OI), and Monthly (101k OI). Primary defense line; breach triggers dealer selling cascades.
0DTE Max Pain level acting as a magnetic target. Coincides closely with Gamma Flip zone, creating a strong friction barrier for bulls.
Monster Resonance support: 25k OI (0DTE), 144k OI (Weekly), 116k OI (Monthly). The ultimate 'floor' for this expiry cycle.
Significant resistance with high Put OI (24k) creating a 'Call Wall' effect due to hedging ceilings in 0DTE.

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Moderate volatility expected. Positive 0DTE GEX (+0.59B) stabilizes intraday, but negative weekly/monthly GEX (-1.28B combined) amplifies tail risk. Price pinned near max pain.
outlook.summary: Spot pinned at 566.89 between Max Pain (566.0) and Gamma Flip (567.14). Dealers long 0DTE gamma suppresses volatility; watch 570 RESONANCE support below. Bearish weekly skew (1.23) indicates hedging pressure. Range-bound bias with upside target to 570.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE Max Pain at 566.0 (0.16% from spot). Primary MM target zone. Price attraction active with high call volume at 566-568 strikes.
Critical gamma equilibrium. Above = dealers long gamma (stable). Below = negative gamma amplification. Spot testing this level now.
RESONANCE across all 3 expiries. Highest MONTHLY PUT OI (37175). ATM in 0DTE with massive volume (92182 CALL + 13929 PUT). Structural support zone.
RESONANCE level. CALL WALL in MONTHLY (15588 OI). PUT WALL in WEEKLY (12955 OI). Dual-role resistance zone.
CONFLUENCE: 0DTE PUT WALL (20421 OI) + MONTHLY strong PUT (29811 OI). Deep support level.
Highest 0DTE CALL OI (34519). Near MONTHLY max pain (593). Hard resistance ceiling.
CONFLUENCE: MONTHLY PUT OI (32565) + 0DTE PUT OI (13823) with heavy volume (71522). Secondary support above 540 wall.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Mixed: 0DTE positive GEX stabilizes near-term; WEEKLY/MONTHLY negative GEX amplifies volatility on breaks below 23200
outlook.summary: Bearish bias with extreme OI-based PCR (2.36) and smirk skew. 0DTE positive GEX (0.64B) provides short-term stability, but negative WEEKLY/MONTHLY GEX signals volatility risk. 23200 RESONANCE level is critical support - break triggers dealer selling cascade. Max Pain magnets at 23400 (WEEKLY) and 24300 (MONTHLY) define range.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE across ALL 3 expiries: 0DTE 563 OI + WEEKLY 224 OI + MONTHLY 112 OI. Strongest structural support. Dealers defend aggressively.
WEEKLY gamma flip zone. Negative GEX (-0.06B) below this level amplifies volatility. Structural inflection point.
WEEKLY Max Pain + 478 PUT OI. Strong magnet near spot (64 pts below). Dealers pin price here at expiry.
CONFLUENCE 0DTE+WEEKLY: 93 OI + 474 OI. Secondary support between spot and 23200 resonance.
CONFLUENCE WEEKLY+MONTHLY: 471 OI + 412 OI. Also MONTHLY Max Pain. Major resistance zone.
WEEKLY dominant CALL wall with 531 OI. Secondary resistance capping upside.
0DTE Max Pain level. Upside magnet if spot breaks above 23520 resistance cluster.
MONTHLY massive PUT wall (597 OI). OTM puts above spot create dealer hedging pressure on rallies.
